---
title: "Data Analysis"
subtitle: "Comprehensive Data Cleaning & Exploratory Analysis of Job Market Trends"
author:
  - name: "Moiz Deshmukh, Prabu Jayabalan, Andrey Pafnutyev, Jason Stopas, Jitvan Vij"
    affiliations:
      - id: bu
        name: Boston University
        city: Boston
        state: MA
          
bibliography: references.bib
csl: /home/ubuntu/ad688-employability-sp25A1-group1/econometrica.csl

format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    df-print: paged
---
